title: Precision Enchanter
description: Have more control over enchanting! Remove the randomness by crafting and removing specific enchantments.
body:
![Precision Enchanter logo](https://i.imgur.com/8521ikt.png)

Have you ever disliked how vanilla enchanting works with its randomness and tedium? With Precision Enchanter, you can craft and extract any enchantments you want with precision!
 
---
 
Craft any enchantment you want with the Enchanter's Workbench. Use the built-in recipe tablet to see exactly what you need!

![Screenshot of Enchanter's Workbench GUI](https://i.imgur.com/u6n2i7n.png)

Extract unwanted or useful enchantments using the Precision Grindstone. No longer will you be stuck with Knockback II!

![Extracting Knockback II from a Diamond Sword using the Precision Grindstone](https://i.imgur.com/Z8bgbpZ.png)

Ever made a mistake when writing a sign? You can edit them with the Quill and Enchanted Quill!

![Editing a sign that says "Slight mistake.,"](https://i.imgur.com/xx3YeTh.png)
